parameters.query:
SELECT DISTINCT c.meter_id, mc.meter_name, c.sic
FROM consumptions c
LEFT JOIN meters_configurations mc ON mc.meter_id = c.meter_id
WHERE c.contract_id = {{ $json.contract_id }}
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  date,
  hour,
  phase_a_voltage,
  phase_b_voltage,
  phase_c_voltage,
  phase_a_current,
  phase_b_current,
  phase_c_current,
  total_power_factor
FROM consumptions
WHERE contract_id = {{ $('Webhook').item.json.contract_id }}
  AND date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '3 days'
ORDER BY date DESC, hour DESC
LIMIT 72

SELECT
  ROUND(AVG(NULLIF(phase_a_voltage,0))::numeric,2)  AS avg_va,
  ROUND(AVG(NULLIF(phase_b_voltage,0))::numeric,2)  AS avg_vb,
  ROUND(AVG(NULLIF(phase_c_voltage,0))::numeric,2)  AS avg_vc,
  ROUND(AVG(NULLIF(phase_a_current,0))::numeric,3)  AS avg_ia,
  ROUND(AVG(NULLIF(phase_b_current,0))::numeric,3)  AS avg_ib,
  ROUND(AVG(NULLIF(phase_c_current,0))::numeric,3)  AS avg_ic,
  ROUND(AVG(NULLIF(total_power_factor,0))::numeric,3) AS avg_fp,
  ROUND(MAX(phase_a_current)::numeric,3)             AS max_ia,
  ROUND(MAX(phase_b_current)::numeric,3)             AS max_ib,
  ROUND(MAX(phase_c_current)::numeric,3)             AS max_ic,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN phase_b_voltage > 1 THEN 1 END)    AS hrs_vb,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN phase_c_voltage > 1 THEN 1 END)    AS hrs_vc,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN phase_a_voltage > 0 THEN 1 END)    AS hrs_total
FROM consumptions
WHERE contract_id = {{ $('Webhook').item.json.contract_id }}
  AND date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
